commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 25. "Judge me, O Lord, according to My righteousness" (ver. 24); that is, attend to My cause. Not according to My punishment, but "according to My righteousness, O Lord, My God," that is, according to this judge Thou Me. "And let them not rejoice over Me;" that is, Mine enemies.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Thy. Many copies read "my "with St. Augustine, Euthymius But thy agrees with the Roman (Calmet) and Alexandrian Septuagint and Hebrew. (Haydock)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
